mapper.select: SELECT genetic_profile.genetic_profile_id AS "molecularProfileId", genetic_profile.stable_id AS "stableId", genetic_profile.cancer_study_id AS "cancerStudyId", cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier AS "cancerStudyIdentifier", genetic_profile.genetic_alteration_type AS "molecularAlterationType", genetic_profile.datatype AS "datatype", genetic_profile.name AS "name", genetic_profile.description AS "description", genetic_profile.show_profile_in_analysis_tab AS "showProfileInAnalysisTab", genetic_profile.pivot_threshold AS "pivotThreshold", genetic_profile.sort_order AS "sortOrder", genetic_profile.generic_assay_type AS "genericAssayType", genetic_profile.patient_level AS "patientLevel" FROM genetic_profile INNER JOIN cancer_study ON genetic_profile.cancer_study_id = cancer_study.cancer_study_id INNER JOIN reference_genome ON cancer_study.reference_genome_id = reference_genome.reference_genome_id WHERE genetic_profile.genetic_alteration_type = 'GENERIC_ASSAY'

WITH generic_assay_query AS ( SELECT concat(entity_stable_id, profile_type) AS attributeId,
AS value, cast(count(value) as INTEGER) AS count FROM generic_assay_data_derived
!= 'NA' AND profile_type = #{profileType} AND
entity_stable_id = #{genericAssayDataBinFilter.stableId}
GROUP BY entity_stable_id, profile_type, value ), generic_assay_sum AS ( SELECT attributeId, sum(count) as generic_assay_count FROM generic_assay_query GROUP BY attributeId ) SELECT * FROM generic_assay_query UNION ALL
SELECT coalesce((SELECT attributeId FROM generic_assay_sum LIMIT 1), concat(#{genericAssayDataBinFilters[0].stableId}, #{profileType})) as attributeId, 'NA' as value, cast(((SELECT * FROM ()) - coalesce((SELECT generic_assay_count FROM generic_assay_sum LIMIT 1), 0)) as INTEGER) as count

WITH profile_level AS ( SELECT count() > 0 AS is_patient_level FROM genetic_profile WHERE patient_level = 1
AND stable_id IN
concat(#{studyId}, '_', #{profileType})
), generic_assay_query AS ( SELECT entity_stable_id AS stableId, value, cast( multiIf( (SELECT is_patient_level FROM profile_level LIMIT 1), count(distinct patient_unique_id), count(distinct sample_unique_id) ) AS INTEGER) AS count FROM generic_assay_data_derived
!= 'NA' AND profile_type = #{profileType} AND
entity_stable_id = #{genericAssayDataFilter.stableId}
GROUP BY entity_stable_id, value ), generic_assay_data_sum AS ( SELECT stableId, sum(count) AS gad_count FROM generic_assay_query GROUP BY stableId ), total_count AS ( SELECT cast( multiIf( (SELECT is_patient_level FROM profile_level LIMIT 1), count(distinct patient_unique_id), count(distinct sample_unique_id) ) AS INTEGER) AS total FROM generic_assay_data_derived
profile_type = #{profileType} AND
)
SELECT * FROM generic_assay_query UNION ALL
SELECT coalesce((SELECT stableId FROM generic_assay_data_sum LIMIT 1), #{genericAssayDataFilters[0].stableId}) as stableId, 'NA' as value, cast(( coalesce((SELECT total FROM total_count LIMIT 1), 0) - coalesce((SELECT gad_count FROM generic_assay_data_sum LIMIT 1), 0)) as INTEGER) as count

WITH profile_level AS ( SELECT count() > 0 AS is_patient_level FROM genetic_profile WHERE patient_level = 1
AND stable_id IN
concat(#{studyId}, '_', #{profileType})
), generic_assay_query AS ( SELECT entity_stable_id AS stableId, value, cast( multiIf( (SELECT is_patient_level FROM profile_level LIMIT 1), count(distinct patient_unique_id), count(distinct sample_unique_id) ) AS INTEGER) AS count FROM generic_assay_data_derived
!= 'NA' AND profile_type = #{profileType} AND
GROUP BY entity_stable_id, value ), generic_assay_entities AS ( SELECT DISTINCT entity_stable_id AS stableId FROM generic_assay_data_derived
profile_type = #{profileType} AND
), generic_assay_data_sum AS ( SELECT stableId, sum(count) AS gad_count FROM generic_assay_query GROUP BY stableId ), total_count AS ( SELECT cast( multiIf( (SELECT is_patient_level FROM profile_level LIMIT 1), count(distinct patient_unique_id), count(distinct sample_unique_id) ) AS INTEGER) AS total FROM generic_assay_data_derived
profile_type = #{profileType} AND
), na_counts AS ( SELECT generic_assay_entities.stableId AS stableId, 'NA' AS value, cast(total_count.total - coalesce(generic_assay_data_sum.gad_count, 0) AS INTEGER) AS count FROM generic_assay_entities CROSS JOIN total_count LEFT JOIN generic_assay_data_sum ON generic_assay_data_sum.stableId = generic_assay_entities.stableId )
SELECT * FROM generic_assay_query UNION ALL SELECT * FROM na_counts WHERE count > 0 ORDER BY toUInt32OrZero(extract(stableId, '^[0-9]+')) ASC, stableId ASC, value ASC

SELECT DISTINCT entity_stable_id FROM generic_assay_profile_entity_derived WHERE profile_stable_id IN #{item}
ORDER BY toUInt32OrZero(extract(entity_stable_id, '^[0-9]+')) ASC, entity_stable_id ASC

SELECT entity_stable_id AS stableId, entity_type AS entityType, properties FROM generic_assay_meta_derived WHERE entity_stable_id IN #{item}
ORDER BY toUInt32OrZero(extract(entity_stable_id, '^[0-9]+')) ASC, entity_stable_id ASC
